data.content:
Migration complete. Here's a summary of the changes:

**`TestProject.csproj`** — Replaced `xunit` 2.9.3, `Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk`, and `xunit.runner.visualstudio` 2.x with `xunit.v3` 3.2.2 and `xunit.runner.visualstudio` 3.1.5. Added `<OutputType>Exe</OutputType>` (v3 tests are self-hosting executables).

**`OrderedTests.cs`** — Changed `[TestCaseOrderer("MyApp.Tests.AlphabeticalOrderer", "TestProject")]` to `[TestCaseOrderer(typeof(AlphabeticalOrderer))]` (v3 requires type-safe references instead of strings).

**`CustomCollectionFixture.cs`** — Changed `[assembly: CollectionBehavior("MyApp.Tests.CustomCollectionFactory", "TestProject")]` to `[assembly: CollectionBehavior(typeof(MyApp.Tests.CustomCollectionFactory))]`.

**`AlphabeticalOrderer.cs`** (new) — Created the orderer implementation using the v3 `ITestCaseOrderer` interface from `Xunit.v3`.

**`global.json`** — Removed the `"test": { "runner": "VSTest" }` config (no longer needed for v3's self-executing model).
